name: Folding Dish Kids' Chair - Pillowfort™
description:
For a sleek style update to your kid's space, pick up this Folding Dish Chair from Pillowfort™. Set on a sturdy metal frame with powder-coated legs, this upholstered dish chair has a tufted design to add a modern look to their space. Featuring a soft, plush construction for a comfy seating option they'll love, this solid color dish chair pairs nicely with their existing decor style. And with the foldable design, this chair is easy to move and store as needed.

We made it better. This product is made with a minimum of 60% recycled fabric material.

Overall Width: 26.94 inches
Overall Height: 28.13 inches
Overall Depth: 21.06 inches
Seat Height (from seat to floor): 11.02 inches
Seat Depth: 15.75 inches
